name: deepinfra-codex-shim
description: Experimental local shim that lets Codex talk to DeepInfra chat completions through the Responses API shape.
author: Bill Erickson

scripts.lint: node --check bin/deepinfra-codex-shim.js && node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/config.mjs && node --check src/logging.mjs && node --check src/responses-to-chat.mjs && node --check src/chat-to-responses.mjs && node --check src/chat-stream-to-responses.mjs && node --check src/server.mjs
